channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: High school basketball player goes below the belt on opponent in cheap shot during district championship game
item.description: A high school basketball player in Ohio caught a low blow from his opponent, and it was controversially not called for a technical foul.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kansas' Zeke Mayo shows screenshots of racist, hateful messages he received after Texas Tech loss
item.description: Kansas guard Zeke Mayo has shared screenshots of racist, hateful messages he received following his performance in a loss to No. 10 Texas Tech. Mayo shared the screenshots Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: MLB's Rob Manfred considering Pete Rose's removal from ineligible list: report
item.description: MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred is reportedly considering removing Pete Rose from the ineligible list as President Donald Trump said he would pardon him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USC's JuJu Watkins hangs 30 points on UCLA at historic Pauley Pavilion
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins came into the house that Alcindor, Walton and Wooden built and put on a show. The stellar sophomore had 30 points, five assists, three blocks and two steals in a game-high 37 minutes and No. 4 Southern California beat No.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 Duke rolls past Florida State 100-65 following Flagg's injury scare
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Isaiah Evans scored 19 points and No. 2 Duke overcame freshman star Cooper Flagg's injury scare to rout Florida State 100-65 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: BOB SUTTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NBA fines Edwards $35K for lingering after ejection, tossing ball into stands; season total at $320K
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards was fined $35,000 by the NBA on Saturday for failing to leave the court in a timely manner following his ejection from a recent game and throwing the ball into the stands, bringing the All-Star's season fine total to $320,000.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: John Collins leads Jazz to 117-116 win over Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Walker Kessler had a go-ahead dunk with 9.7 seconds left to help the Utah Jazz beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 117-116 on Friday night, snapping a six-game losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating Jon Gruden into their ring of honor
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating former coach Jon Gruden into the team's ring of honor less than four years after removing him over his use of racist, homophobic and misogynistic language in emails he wrote to an NFL executive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah wins third straight, dominating Minnesota, 6-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller tallied a career-high five points (one goal, four assists) and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 6-1 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Robertson scores 2 goals in the 2nd period as the Maple Leafs beat the Blackhawks 5-2
item.description: Nicholas Robertson scored twice in the second period as the Toronto Maple Leafs beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's comeback effort falls short at UCF, 76-72
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Darius Johnson scored a reverse layup with 2.5 seconds left to give UCF the lead and Keyshawn Hall added two free throws after a turnover as the Knights knocked off Utah, 76-72 Sunday to snap a seven-game losing streak and earn their first win in a month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
